changes.description: Unified workspace data resolver: loads all section data in a single call, consolidating overview resolvers and all 6 section formatters
Added deriveSectionFromPath utility for URL-to-section resolution
Persistent workspace shell component: manages activeSection state, shallow routing, panel switching, and URL synchronization
Panel dispatcher mapping section identifiers to existing panel components
Added onNavigate callback prop for state-driven navigation, with Link fallback for backward compatibility
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with resolveWorkspaceData
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with initialSection='debt'
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with initialSection='continuity'
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with initialSection='maturity'
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with initialSection='progression'
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with initialSection='evidence'
Refactored to delegate to SQOWorkspaceShell with initialSection='handoff'
37 tests in 7 suites covering workspace data resolution, section equivalence, path derivation, deep-linking, navigation, governance
Added test:sqo-workspace script and included in aggregate test
